name: producer-player
description: Producer Player monorepo: existing Swift MVP + new cross-platform Electron/TypeScript implementation.

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n RENDERER,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @producer-player/contracts && npm run build -w @producer-player/domain
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @producer-player/renderer && npm run build -w @producer-player/electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @producer-player/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @producer-player/domain && npm run typecheck -w @producer-player/renderer && npm run typecheck -w @producer-player/electron && npm run typecheck -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e: npm run build && npm run test -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e:ci: npm run build && npm run ci -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.release:desktop:mac: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip --publish never
